description_long: This is a cylindrical, metallic can with a vibrant red exterior and a slightly domed, silver-colored top and bottom. The side of the can features a white, outlined hexagonal label with the text 'Off Brand Soda' printed vertically, suggesting it is a beverage container. The back of the can displays a small barcode, while the rest of the surface is smooth and unadorned. The can's surface is reflective and glossy, typical of aluminum soda cans, and it lacks any visible handle or spout. The top is sealed, with a faint impression where a pull tab would typically be found, though no tab is visible. The overall appearance is clean and modern, with branding and minimalistic design elements.
description: A red, metallic soda can with a silver top and bottom, featuring 'Off Brand Soda' text and a barcode on the back. The surface is glossy and smooth, with no visible handle or tab.
description_view_0: The can is shown with the 'Off Brand Soda' label prominently visible on the side, and the silver top is clearly seen.
description_view_1: This view shows the can slightly rotated, still displaying the label but with more of the can's curvature and the edge of the barcode just visible.
description_view_2: The back of the can is visible, featuring a small barcode near the bottom, with no branding or text on this side.
description_view_3: This view shows the plain red side of the can, with no visible text, barcode, or label.
